summer.cue: 일 년 중 가장 더운 계절
summer.en: the warmest season of the year, between spring and fall
to spend the summer season in a particular place

ex.en: They summer in the countryside every year.

transient.en: lasting for only a short time
a person who does not stay in one place for long, especially someone without a permanent home

ex.en: The shelter provides food for transients passing through town.
ex.ko: 그 보호소는 마을을 지나가는 노숙자들에게 음식을 제공한다.

drink.en: take liquid into your mouth and swallow it

ex.en: He drank a glass of water.

drink.en: a serving of an alcoholic beverage

ex.en: Let's grab a drink after work.

hold.en: have or keep something in your hand or arms
organize and take part in an event

ex.en: The school holds a festival every autumn.
ex.ko: 그 학교는 매년 가을 축제를 개최한다.

hold.en: keep something for someone to use or collect later

ex.en: Can you hold my seat while I get some coffee?
ex.ko: 내가 커피 가지러 가는 동안 내 자리 좀 맡아 줄래?

hold.en: have enough space for a certain amount or number

ex.en: This hall can hold up to 500 people.
ex.ko: 이 홀은 최대 500명을 수용할 수 있다.

hold.en: wait on the phone without hanging up

ex.en: Please hold while I transfer your call.
ex.ko: 전화 연결해 드리는 동안 끊지 말고 기다려 주세요.

hold.en: to not add a particular ingredient when preparing food or a drink, especially when ordering

ex.en: Can I get a burger and hold the pickles?
